# Agam Labs

> Privacy-first Android apps for Indian users. "Agam" means "inside" in Tamil. Data stays on device.

## Company

Agam Labs builds Android apps that prioritize user privacy. Our apps have no internet permission (except Play Billing), no analytics, no tracking, no cloud. All processing happens on-device.

- Website: https://agamlabs.dev
- Contact: hello@agamlabs.dev
- Developer: Swaminathan K

## Products

### PhotoFresh
Clean gallery. Clear mind.
Find duplicates, blurry shots, old screenshots, and WhatsApp clutter — clean up in minutes. 100% on-device.
- Product page: https://agamlabs.dev/photofresh
- Privacy policy: https://agamlabs.dev/photofresh/privacy
- Support: https://agamlabs.dev/photofresh/support
- Status: Coming soon to Google Play
- Pricing: Free (Quick Scan + unlimited deletes) | Premium ₹49/mo or ₹299/yr

### NotiFresh
Tame your notifications.
Smart categorization, quiet hours, and batch management — all on-device, all private.
- Product page: https://agamlabs.dev/notifresh
- Privacy policy: https://agamlabs.dev/notifresh/privacy
- Support: https://agamlabs.dev/notifresh/support
- Status: Coming soon

- NotiFresh Privacy: https://agamlabs.dev/notifresh/privacy
- NotiFresh Support: https://agamlabs.dev/notifresh/support

## Privacy Philosophy

- Zero data collection — not even crash reports
- No INTERNET permission in apps (except Google Play Billing)
- No Firebase, Mixpanel, Amplitude, or Crashlytics
- All processing on-device
- Uninstall removes everything — nothing on our servers
